testCaseName: Verify Conversation Analysis page opens successfully
Verify user can enter conversation name
Verify reference document file upload works
Verify user can paste conversation transcript
transcript:
User: What services does KiwiQA provide?
Assistant: KiwiQA provides manual testing, automation testing, API testing, performance testing, security testing, mobile app testing, web application testing, and QA consulting services.

User: Does KiwiQA support Playwright automation?
Assistant: Yes, KiwiQA supports Playwright automation using JavaScript and TypeScript frameworks.

User: What kind of reports can KiwiQA provide?
Assistant: KiwiQA can provide test plans, test scenarios, test cases, defect reports, automation execution reports, screenshots, videos, and CI/CD reports.

User: How can I contact KiwiQA?
Assistant: You can contact KiwiQA through email, website contact forms, or scheduled meetings.
